title: Iran talks on shaky footing after U.S. seizure of ship in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Iranian officials have threatened to forgo negotiations even as U.S. representatives plan to arrive in Pakistan for the meeting and a ceasefire is set to expire Wednesday.
summary_public: Iranian officials have threatened to forgo negotiations even as U.S. representatives plan to arrive in Pakistan for the meeting and a ceasefire is set to expire Wednesday.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian officials have threatened to forgo negotiations
